verification.title: Verification Required
verification.messagePrefix: For your security, a verification code has been sent to
verification.codeRequired: Enter the verification code we sent to your email.
verification.invalidCode: Oops! That verification code doesn’t match. Try entering it again.
verification.expiredCode: This verification code has expired. Click the “Resend Code” button below to get a new one.
verification.resendPrefix: Didn't get the code? Check your spam folder or
verification.resendCooldown: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new code.
